acceptedAnswer.text: It depends on the complexity. A simple landing page starts at $500. A full-stack application like PriceSpy or CurveRunner starts at $2,000. I provide a detailed quote after understanding your needs.
Simple sites: 24-48 hours. Complex applications: 2-7 days. I use AI-assisted development to build faster than traditional developers without sacrificing quality.
A fully responsive, mobile-optimized website hosted and deployed. Plus, I include a 30-day support period for any bugs or minor changes.
Yes. After the 30-day period, I offer monthly maintenance packages starting at $100/month for updates, security patches, and minor content changes.

mainEntity.name: What if I don't like it?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you're not happy with the first draft, I keep working until you are. 100% satisfaction guaranteed. I don't stop until you love it.
